languages.text: "Ты правда считаешь, что смысл существования можно упростить до функции?"
"Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"
languages.original_text: "Ты правда считаешь, что смысл существования можно упростить до функции?"

traits.locale_text: "Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"
"Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"
"Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"

languages.text: «¿De verdad cree que todo el sentido de la existencia puede reducirse a la función de cada individuo?».
languages.original_text: "Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"

traits.locale_text: «¿De verdad cree que todo el sentido de la existencia puede reducirse a la función de cada individuo?».

languages.text: “你真相信，存在的意义可以归结为一个人的职能吗？”
languages.original_text: "Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"

traits.locale_text: “你真相信，存在的意义可以归结为一个人的职能吗？”

languages.text: « Vous pensez vraiment que le sens de la vie n'est rien de plus que notre fonction ? »
languages.original_text: "Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous pensez vraiment que le sens de la vie n'est rien de plus que notre fonction ? »

languages.text: "Glaubt Ihr wirklich, die Bedeutung der Existenz kann auf jemandes Funktion reduziert werden?"
languages.original_text: "Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"

traits.locale_text: "Glaubt Ihr wirklich, die Bedeutung der Existenz kann auf jemandes Funktion reduziert werden?"

languages.text: "存在の意味を自分の機能に還元できると本当に信じているのか？"
languages.original_text: "Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"

languages.text: "Varoluşun anlamının, kişinin işlevine indirgenebileceğine gerçekten inanıyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "Do you truly believe the meaning of existence can be reduced to one's function?"

traits.locale_text: "Varoluşun anlamının, kişinin işlevine indirgenebileceğine gerçekten inanıyor musun?"
